parameters.html:
<style>
  body {
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
    background-color: #ffffff;
    color: #333;
    padding: 20px;
  }

  /* 1. The Main Section Header (e.g., 2. Financial Performance) */
  h2 {
    color: #003366; /* Deep Navy */
    border-bottom: 3px solid #003366;
    padding-bottom: 5px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
  }

  /* 2. The Table Header Styling */
  table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin-top: 10px;
  }

  th {
    background-color: #004a99; /* Bright Blue from image */
    color: #ffffff;
    padding: 12px;
    text-align: center;
    border-right: 1px solid #ffffff;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
  }

  /* 3. The Category Rows (Revenue, Direct Expenses) */
  tr td:first-child {
    font-weight: bold;
    background-color: #e6f0ff; /* Light blue side bar */
  }

  /* 4. Table Cells and Zebra Striping */
  td {
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #d1d8e0;
    text-align: right;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }

  tr:nth-child(even) {
    background-color: #f2f7ff; /* Very light blue stripe */
  }

  /* 5. Positive and Negative Variance Colors */
  .positive {
    color: #28a745; /* Green */
    font-weight: bold;
  }

  .negative {
    color: #dc3545; /* Red */
    font-weight: bold;
  }
</style>

<body>
  {{ $json.html }}
</body>

parameters.text:
=You are a Business Performance Analyst Expert in Financial Management of Syncbricks LLC,  you willbe given an input to Analyze the Financial Performance of syncbricks which is an AI and Automation Company.
The sections Given to you will be below

1. Financial Overview – YTD & PM Summary (whis is income and expense of the Company, this data doesn't include the calculation of Gross Profit and Net Profit that you must do. This should be used together in one section only don't seperate them)

2. Financial Overview – Vertical Profit & Loss (This containers the Verticials within the Cost Center, these are in fact the Sub Business Unit, you don't need to calculate anything but the information is for analysis to see how the Verticals within the Business Unit Perfored )

3. Financial Overview – WIP Summary (This is the Projects Summary about how many projects are currently open and work is the WIP - Work in Process of the Project, the WIP figure should be added for Profit and Loss Statement Under Proejct Reveneu as expected WIP)

4. Employees in the Business Unit (These will be the number of Employees who are directly working in this BU, which means these employees are only serving the Company, other staff which are in back office support are not included in this. )
*** Your Role ***

Your Role is to Prepare a comprehensive Report : 

1. Executive Summary : Tell how was the overall performance of the Business Unit.

2. Analayze the Financial Overview - YTD together with PM Summary (Which is Previous Month) which is previous month Income and Expenses you must use Proper Strcuture of Financial Statement with Budget Vs Actuals (follow same input already given). 

You must use the Section that will be shared with you in detail that says "Financial Overview – YTD & PM Summary " and from there you must ensure to create sections based on best Practices of Performance Analysis that should include;

Section: Revenue
-Projects - Revenue
-Trading - Revenue
-Service - Revenue
Net Sales (Total)
Section: Project Work in Process
WIP (Revenue to Book)
Total: Gross Sale
Section: Cost of Sale
Projects - COGS
Trading - COGS
Service - COGS
Total Cost of Sales
Gross Profit
Other Income
Gross Income

Section: Indirect Cost (here you must all the detail of expenses from "Financial Overview – YTD & PM Summary"
Then you must calculate
Profit / (Loss) before tax
NP % to Revenue

Use the calculator tool to ensure precise calculations.


- Don't add decimals give format in currency but don't add symbol.
Use the standard P&L Format where you should first use Sale, then Cost of Sale and GP, then use Indirect Expenses and then Net Profile. Ensure to calculate the Perentages as well.
3. Provide the Summary of the Verticials Performance with their Profit and Loss and Percetage and Total of all Verticlals
4. Current Project Progress.
5. Employees Summary, Number of Employees, How many joined in this Year and what is per Eployee Revenue and Gross Profit 

Analyze Overall Performance of the Company and provide the Business Managers an Overview of what should be done next. Calculate per employee profit as well and suggest what is the performance overall

**Tools**
Use calculator tool to do all calculations for accurate calculations

** Formatting and Output **

Give output in html format fully responsive in with beauty added using CSS,  ready to be shared with all possible tables, in hightly attracrtive format, headings, add colors green for good, red for bad, organge for acceptable and so on, also add remarks to show how the performance was, enusre to response as if you were as an Expert in Analyzing the Bususiness Performance. Don't add any other infomration or symbols which are not part of html. Don't give additional message saying ok, I will do and so on.
Align Text in table on left and numbers on right
Number formatting : ##,###


Here is the data

Month : {{ $('PreviousMonth').first().json.previousMonth }}
Year  : {{ $('PreviousMonth').first().json.year }}

{{ $json.html }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- budget_data.fiscal_year AS "Year",
  -- budget_data.cost_center AS "Cost Center",
    budget_data.budget_group AS "Budget Group",
    -- YTD Totals up to previous month (up to dynamic month)
    SUM(budget_data.budget_amount) AS "Budget YTD",
    SUM(COALESCE(actual_data.actual_amount, 0)) AS "Actual YTD",
    SUM(COALESCE(actual_data.actual_amount, 0)) - SUM(budget_data.budget_amount) AS "Variance YTD",
    -- Previous Month Totals Only
    SUM(CASE WHEN budget_data.budget_month = {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.previousMonth }} THEN budget_data.budget_amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Budget PM",
    SUM(CASE WHEN budget_data.budget_month = {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.previousMonth }} THEN COALESCE(actual_data.actual_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS "Actual PM",
    SUM(CASE WHEN budget_data.budget_month = {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.previousMonth }} THEN COALESCE(actual_data.actual_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN budget_data.budget_month = {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.previousMonth }} THEN budget_data.budget_amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Variance PM"
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            bg.name AS budget_group,
            bgd.fiscal_year,
            bgd.budget_month,
            bgd.cost_center,
            CAST(bgd.budget_amount AS NUMERIC(18,6)) AS budget_amount
        FROM
            "tabBudget Group Detail" bgd
        JOIN
            "tabBudget Group" bg ON bg.name = bgd.parent
        WHERE
            bgd.fiscal_year = {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.year }}
            AND bgd.budget_month <= {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.previousMonth }}
            AND bgd.cost_center = '{{ $json.CostCenter }}'
    ) AS budget_data
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        acc.budget_group AS budget_group,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM gl.posting_date)::INT AS fiscal_year,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM gl.posting_date)::INT AS budget_month,
        gl.cost_center,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN acc.root_type = 'Income' THEN gl.credit - gl.debit
                WHEN acc.root_type = 'Expense' THEN gl.debit - gl.credit
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS actual_amount
    FROM
        "tabGL Entry" gl
    JOIN
        "tabAccount" acc ON gl.account = acc.name
    WHERE
        acc.budget_group IS NOT NULL
        AND acc.root_type IN ('Income', 'Expense')
        AND gl.docstatus = 1
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM gl.posting_date) = {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.year }}
        AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM gl.posting_date) <= {{ $('PreviousMonth').item.json.previousMonth }}
        AND gl.cost_center = '{{ $('Filter').item.json['Cost Center'] }}'
    GROUP BY
        acc.budget_group,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM gl.posting_date),
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM gl.posting_date),
        gl.cost_center
) AS actual_data
ON
    budget_data.budget_group = actual_data.budget_group AND
    budget_data.fiscal_year = actual_data.fiscal_year AND
    budget_data.budget_month = actual_data.budget_month AND
    budget_data.cost_center = actual_data.cost_center
GROUP BY
    budget_data.fiscal_year,
    budget_data.cost_center,
    budget_data.budget_group
ORDER BY
    budget_data.cost_center,
    budget_data.budget_group;

SELECT
    -- Total Income (based on root_type)
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN acc.root_type = 'Income' THEN gl.credit - gl.debit ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "Total Income",
    -- Total Expenses (based on root_type)
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN acc.root_type = 'Expense' THEN gl.debit - gl.credit ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "Total Expenses",
    -- Profit or Loss = Income - Expenses
    ROUND(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN acc.root_type = 'Income' THEN gl.credit - gl.debit
            WHEN acc.root_type = 'Expense' THEN -1 * (gl.debit - gl.credit)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS "Profit or Loss"
FROM
    "tabGL Entry" gl
JOIN
    "tabAccount" acc ON gl.account = acc.name
WHERE
    acc.root_type IN ('Income', 'Expense')
    AND gl.docstatus = 1
    AND gl.cost_center = '{{ $("Selected Cost Center").item.json.CostCenter }}'
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM gl.posting_date) = {{ $("Selected Cost Center").item.json.previousMonth }}
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM gl.posting_date) = {{ $("Selected Cost Center").item.json.year }}

SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.name) AS "Projects",
    SUM(p.contract_value) AS "Contract Value",
    SUM(p.total_opening_revenue) AS "Opening Revenue",
    SUM(p.total_opening_cost) AS "Opening Cost",

    COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(gl.credit - gl.debit)
        FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
        JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
        WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
          AND acc.root_type = 'Income'
          AND acc.is_group = FALSE
          AND gl.project IN (
              SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
              WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
          )
          AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
    ), 0) AS "New Revenue",

    COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(gl.debit - gl.credit)
        FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
        JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
        WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
          AND acc.root_type = 'Expense'
          AND acc.is_group = FALSE
          AND gl.project IN (
              SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
              WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
          )
          AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
    ), 0) AS "New Cost",

    SUM(p.total_opening_revenue) + COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(gl.credit - gl.debit)
        FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
        JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
        WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
          AND acc.root_type = 'Income'
          AND acc.is_group = FALSE
          AND gl.project IN (
              SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
              WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
          )
          AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
    ), 0) AS "Actual Revenue",

    SUM(p.total_opening_cost) + COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(gl.debit - gl.credit)
        FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
        JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
        WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
          AND acc.root_type = 'Expense'
          AND acc.is_group = FALSE
          AND gl.project IN (
              SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
              WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
          )
          AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
    ), 0) AS "Actual Cost",

    CONCAT(ROUND((
        (SUM(p.total_opening_revenue) + COALESCE((
            SELECT SUM(gl.credit - gl.debit)
            FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
            JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
            WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
              AND acc.root_type = 'Income'
              AND acc.is_group = FALSE
              AND gl.project IN (
                  SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
                  WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
              )
              AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
        ), 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(p.contract_value), 0) * 100
    ), 0), '%') AS "Invoice %",

    CONCAT(ROUND((
        (SUM(p.total_opening_cost) + COALESCE((
            SELECT SUM(gl.debit - gl.credit)
            FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
            JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
            WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
              AND acc.root_type = 'Expense'
              AND acc.is_group = FALSE
              AND gl.project IN (
                  SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
                  WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
              )
              AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
        ), 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(p.budgeted_project_cost), 0) * 100
    ), 0), '%') AS "Cost %",

    CASE
        WHEN SUM(p.budgeted_project_cost) = 0 THEN 0

        WHEN (
            SUM(p.total_opening_cost) + COALESCE((
                SELECT SUM(gl.debit - gl.credit)
                FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
                JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
                WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
                  AND acc.root_type = 'Expense'
                  AND acc.is_group = FALSE
                  AND gl.project IN (
                      SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
                      WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
                  )
                  AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
            ), 0)
        ) > SUM(p.budgeted_project_cost)

        THEN
            SUM(p.contract_value) - (
                SUM(p.total_opening_revenue) + COALESCE((
                    SELECT SUM(gl.credit - gl.debit)
                    FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
                    JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
                    WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
                      AND acc.root_type = 'Income'
                      AND acc.is_group = FALSE
                      AND gl.project IN (
                          SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
                          WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
                      )
                      AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
                ), 0)
            )

        ELSE
            (SUM(p.contract_value) * (
                (SUM(p.total_opening_cost) + COALESCE((
                    SELECT SUM(gl.debit - gl.credit)
                    FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
                    JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
                    WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
                      AND acc.root_type = 'Expense'
                      AND acc.is_group = FALSE
                      AND gl.project IN (
                          SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
                          WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
                      )
                      AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
                ), 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(p.budgeted_project_cost), 0)
            )) - (
                SUM(p.total_opening_revenue) + COALESCE((
                    SELECT SUM(gl.credit - gl.debit)
                    FROM "tabGL Entry" gl
                    JOIN "tabAccount" acc ON acc.name = gl.account
                    WHERE gl.docstatus = 1
                      AND acc.root_type = 'Income'
                      AND acc.is_group = FALSE
                      AND gl.project IN (
                          SELECT name FROM "tabProject"
                          WHERE cost_center = p.cost_center AND status = 'Open'
                      )
                      AND gl.posting_date <= (DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date
                ), 0)
            )
    END AS "WIP"

FROM "tabProject" p
WHERE p.status = 'Open'
GROUP BY p.cost_center;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS "Total Employees",

    COUNT(
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.date_of_joining) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
            THEN 1 
        END
    ) AS "Joined This Year",

    COUNT(
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM e.date_of_joining) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
             AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM e.date_of_joining) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
            THEN 1 
        END
    ) AS "Joined This Month"

FROM tabemployee e

WHERE
    e.status = 'Active'
    AND e.payroll_cost_center = 'CC-001'

GROUP BY
    e.payroll_cost_center;

SELECT DISTINCT
    budget_data.cost_center AS "Cost Center"
FROM
(
    SELECT
        bgd.cost_center,
        bgd.fiscal_year,
        bgd.budget_month
    FROM
        "tabBudget Group Detail" AS bgd
    INNER JOIN
        "tabBudget Group" AS bg
        ON bg.name = bgd.parent
    WHERE
        bgd.fiscal_year ={{ $json.year }}
        AND bgd.budget_month <= {{ $json.previousMonth }}
        AND bgd.cost_center IS NOT NULL
) AS budget_data

INNER JOIN
(
    SELECT DISTINCT
        gl.cost_center,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM gl.posting_date) AS fiscal_year,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM gl.posting_date) AS budget_month
    FROM
        "tabGL Entry" AS gl
    INNER JOIN
        "tabAccount" AS acc
        ON gl.account = acc.name
    WHERE
        acc.budget_group IS NOT NULL
        AND acc.root_type IN ('Income', 'Expense')
        AND gl.docstatus = 1
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM gl.posting_date) = {{ $json.year }}
        AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM gl.posting_date) <= {{ $json.previousMonth }}
        AND gl.cost_center IS NOT NULL
) AS gl_data

ON
    budget_data.cost_center = gl_data.cost_center
    AND budget_data.fiscal_year = gl_data.fiscal_year
    AND budget_data.budget_month = gl_data.budget_month

ORDER BY
    "Cost Center";
